column.Comment: Transitive database dependencies.

column.name: missing_dependencies
column.Comment: Missing transitive database dependencies.

column.name: keyword
column.Comment: The keyword used in ClickHouse parser.

column.name: library_name
column.Comment: Name of the library.

column.name: license_type
column.Comment: License type — e.g. Apache, MIT.

column.name: license_path
column.Comment: Path to the file with the license text.

column.name: license_text
column.Comment: License text.

column.name: macro
column.Comment: The macro name.

column.name: substitution
column.Comment: The substitution string.

column.name: name
column.Comment: Setting name.

column.name: value
column.Comment: Setting value.

column.name: default
column.Comment: Setting default value.

column.name: changed
column.Comment: 1 if the setting was explicitly defined in the config or explicitly changed.

column.name: description
column.Comment: Setting description.

column.name: min
column.Comment: Minimum value of the setting, if any is set via constraints. If the setting has no minimum value, contains NULL.

column.name: max
column.Comment: Maximum value of the setting, if any is set via constraints. If the setting has no maximum value, contains NULL.

column.name: disallowed_values
column.Comment: List of disallowed values

column.name: readonly
column.Comment: Shows whether the current user can change the setting: 0 — Current user can change the setting, 1 — Current user can't change the setting.

column.name: type
column.Comment: Setting type (implementation specific string value).

column.name: is_obsolete
column.Comment: Shows whether a setting is obsolete.

column.name: tier
column.Comment: Support level for this feature. ClickHouse features are organized in tiers, varying depending on the current status of their development and the expectations one might have when using them: * PRODUCTION: The feature is stable, safe to use and does not have issues interacting with other PRODUCTION features. * BETA: The feature is stable and safe. The outcome of using it together with other features is unknown and correctness is not guaranteed. Testing and reports are welcome. * EXPERIMENTAL: The feature is under development. Only intended for developers and ClickHouse enthusiasts. The feature might or might not work and could be removed at any time. * OBSOLETE: No longer supported. Either it is already removed or it will be removed in future releases.

column.name: database
column.Comment: The name of the database the table is in.

column.name: table
column.Comment: Table name.

column.name: elapsed
column.Comment: The time elapsed (in seconds) since the merge started.

column.name: progress
column.Comment: The percentage of completed work from 0 to 1.

column.name: num_parts
column.Comment: The number of parts to be merged.

column.name: source_part_names
column.Comment: The list of source parts names.

column.name: result_part_name
column.Comment: The name of the part that will be formed as the result of merging.

column.name: source_part_paths
column.Comment: The list of paths for each source part.

column.name: result_part_path
column.Comment: The path of the part that will be formed as the result of merging.

column.name: partition_id
column.Comment: The identifier of the partition where the merge is happening.

column.name: partition
column.Comment: The name of the partition

column.name: is_mutation
column.Comment: 1 if this process is a part mutation.

column.name: total_size_bytes_compressed
column.Comment: The total size of the compressed data in the merged chunks.

column.name: total_size_bytes_uncompressed
column.Comment: The total size of compressed data in the merged chunks.

column.name: total_size_marks
column.Comment: The total number of marks in the merged parts.

column.name: bytes_read_uncompressed
column.Comment: Number of bytes read, uncompressed.

column.name: rows_read
column.Comment: Number of rows read.

column.name: bytes_written_uncompressed
column.Comment: Number of bytes written, uncompressed.

column.name: rows_written
column.Comment: Number of rows written.

column.name: columns_written
column.Comment: Number of columns written (for Vertical merge algorithm).

column.name: memory_usage
column.Comment: Memory consumption of the merge process.

column.name: thread_id
column.Comment: Thread ID of the merge process.

column.name: merge_type
column.Comment: The type of current merge. Empty if it's an mutation.

column.name: merge_algorithm
column.Comment: The algorithm used in current merge. Empty if it's an mutation.

column.name: hostname
column.Comment: Hostname of the server executing the query.

column.name: event_date
column.Comment: Event date.

column.name: event_time
column.Comment: Event time.

column.name: event_time_microseconds
column.Comment: Event time with microseconds resolution.

column.name: ProfileEvent_Query
column.Comment: Number of queries to be interpreted and potentially executed. Does not include queries that failed to parse or were rejected due to AST size limits, quota limits or limits on the number of simultaneously running queries. May include internal queries initiated by ClickHouse itself. Does not count subqueries.

column.name: ProfileEvent_SelectQuery
column.Comment: Same as Query, but only for SELECT queries.

column.name: ProfileEvent_InsertQuery
column.Comment: Same as Query, but only for INSERT queries.

column.name: ProfileEvent_InitialQuery
column.Comment: Same as Query, but only counts initial queries (see is_initial_query).

column.name: ProfileEvent_InitialSelectQuery
column.Comment: Same as InitialQuery, but only for SELECT queries.

column.name: ProfileEvent_QueriesWithSubqueries
column.Comment: Count queries with all subqueries

column.name: ProfileEvent_SelectQueriesWithSubqueries
column.Comment: Count SELECT queries with all subqueries

column.name: ProfileEvent_InsertQueriesWithSubqueries
column.Comment: Count INSERT queries with all subqueries

column.name: ProfileEvent_SelectQueriesWithPrimaryKeyUsage
column.Comment: Count SELECT queries which use the primary key to evaluate the WHERE condition

column.name: ProfileEvent_AsyncInsertQuery
column.Comment: Same as InsertQuery, but only for asynchronous INSERT queries.

column.name: ProfileEvent_AsyncInsertBytes
column.Comment: Data size in bytes of asynchronous INSERT queries.

column.name: ProfileEvent_AsyncInsertRows
column.Comment: Number of rows inserted by asynchronous INSERT queries.

column.name: ProfileEvent_AsyncInsertCacheHits
column.Comment: Number of times a duplicate hash id has been found in asynchronous INSERT hash id cache.

column.name: ProfileEvent_FailedInternalQuery
column.Comment: Number of failed internal queries.

column.name: ProfileEvent_FailedInternalSelectQuery
column.Comment: Same as FailedInternalQuery, but only for SELECT queries.

column.name: ProfileEvent_FailedInternalInsertQuery
column.Comment: Same as FailedInternalQuery, but only for INSERT queries.

column.name: ProfileEvent_FailedInitialQuery
column.Comment: Number of failed initial queries.

column.name: ProfileEvent_FailedInitialSelectQuery
column.Comment: Same as FailedInitialQuery, but only for SELECT queries.

column.name: ProfileEvent_FailedQuery
column.Comment: Number of total failed queries, both internal and user queries.

column.name: ProfileEvent_FailedSelectQuery
column.Comment: Same as FailedQuery, but only for SELECT queries.

column.name: ProfileEvent_FailedInsertQuery
column.Comment: Same as FailedQuery, but only for INSERT queries.

column.name: ProfileEvent_FailedAsyncInsertQuery
column.Comment: Number of failed ASYNC INSERT queries.

column.name: ProfileEvent_ASTFuzzerQueries
column.Comment: Number of fuzzed queries attempted by the server-side AST fuzzer.

column.name: ProfileEvent_QueryTimeMicroseconds
column.Comment: Total time of all queries.

column.name: ProfileEvent_SelectQueryTimeMicroseconds
column.Comment: Total time of SELECT queries.

column.name: ProfileEvent_InsertQueryTimeMicroseconds
column.Comment: Total time of INSERT queries.

column.name: ProfileEvent_OtherQueryTimeMicroseconds
column.Comment: Total time of queries that are not SELECT or INSERT.

column.name: ProfileEvent_FileOpen
column.Comment: Number of files opened.

column.name: ProfileEvent_Seek
column.Comment: Number of times the 'lseek' function was called.

column.name: ProfileEvent_ReadBufferFromFileDescriptorRead
column.Comment: Number of reads (read/pread) from a file descriptor. Does not include sockets.

column.name: ProfileEvent_ReadBufferFromFileDescriptorReadFailed
column.Comment: Number of times the read (read/pread) from a file descriptor have failed.

column.name: ProfileEvent_ReadBufferFromFileDescriptorReadBytes
column.Comment: Number of bytes read from file descriptors. If the file is compressed, this will show the compressed data size.

column.name: ProfileEvent_WriteBufferFromFileDescriptorWrite
column.Comment: Number of writes (write/pwrite) to a file descriptor. Does not include sockets.

column.name: ProfileEvent_WriteBufferFromFileDescriptorWriteFailed
column.Comment: Number of times the write (write/pwrite) to a file descriptor have failed.

column.name: ProfileEvent_WriteBufferFromFileDescriptorWriteBytes
column.Comment: Number of bytes written to file descriptors. If the file is compressed, this will show compressed data size.

column.name: ProfileEvent_FileSync
column.Comment: Number of times the F_FULLFSYNC/fsync/fdatasync function was called for files.

column.name: ProfileEvent_DirectorySync
column.Comment: Number of times the F_FULLFSYNC/fsync/fdatasync function was called for directories.

column.name: ProfileEvent_FileSyncElapsedMicroseconds
column.Comment: Total time spent waiting for F_FULLFSYNC/fsync/fdatasync syscall for files.

column.name: ProfileEvent_DirectorySyncElapsedMicroseconds
column.Comment: Total time spent waiting for F_FULLFSYNC/fsync/fdatasync syscall for directories.

column.name: ProfileEvent_ReadCompressedBytes
column.Comment: Number of bytes (the number of bytes before decompression) read from compressed sources (files, network).

column.name: ProfileEvent_CompressedReadBufferBlocks
column.Comment: Number of compressed blocks (the blocks of data that are compressed independent of each other) read from compressed sources (files, network).

column.name: ProfileEvent_CompressedReadBufferBytes
column.Comment: Number of uncompressed bytes (the number of bytes after decompression) read from compressed sources (files, network).

column.name: ProfileEvent_CompressedReadBufferChecksumDoesntMatch
column.Comment: Number of times the compressed block checksum did not match.

column.name: ProfileEvent_CompressedReadBufferChecksumDoesntMatchSingleBitMismatch
column.Comment: Number of times a compressed block checksum mismatch was caused by a single-bit difference.

column.name: ProfileEvent_CompressedReadBufferChecksumDoesntMatchMicroseconds
column.Comment: Total time spent detecting bit-flips due to compressed block checksum mismatches.

column.name: ProfileEvent_UncompressedCacheHits
column.Comment: Number of times a block of data has been found in the uncompressed cache (and decompression was avoided).

column.name: ProfileEvent_UncompressedCacheMisses
column.Comment: Number of times a block of data has not been found in the uncompressed cache (and required decompression).

column.name: ProfileEvent_UncompressedCacheWeightLost
column.Comment: Number of bytes evicted from the uncompressed cache.

column.name: ProfileEvent_PageCacheHits
column.Comment: Number of times a block of data has been found in the userspace page cache.

column.name: ProfileEvent_PageCacheMisses
column.Comment: Number of times a block of data has not been found in the userspace page cache.

column.name: ProfileEvent_PageCacheWeightLost
column.Comment: Number of bytes evicted from the userspace page cache

column.name: ProfileEvent_PageCacheResized
column.Comment: Number of times the userspace page cache was auto-resized (typically happens a few times per second, controlled by memory_worker_period_ms).

column.name: ProfileEvent_PageCacheOvercommitResize
column.Comment: Number of times the userspace page cache was auto-resized to free memory during a memory allocation.

column.name: ProfileEvent_PageCacheReadBytes
column.Comment: Number of bytes read from userspace page cache.

column.name: ProfileEvent_MMappedFileCacheHits
column.Comment: Number of times a file has been found in the MMap cache (for the 'mmap' read_method), so we didn't have to mmap it again.

column.name: ProfileEvent_MMappedFileCacheMisses
column.Comment: Number of times a file has not been found in the MMap cache (for the 'mmap' read_method), so we had to mmap it again.

column.name: ProfileEvent_OpenedFileCacheHits
column.Comment: Number of times a file has been found in the opened file cache, so we didn't have to open it again.

column.name: ProfileEvent_OpenedFileCacheMisses
column.Comment: Number of times a file has been found in the opened file cache, so we had to open it again.

column.name: ProfileEvent_OpenedFileCacheMicroseconds
column.Comment: Amount of time spent executing OpenedFileCache methods.

column.name: ProfileEvent_AIOWrite
column.Comment: Number of writes with Linux or FreeBSD AIO interface

column.name: ProfileEvent_AIOWriteBytes
column.Comment: Number of bytes written with Linux or FreeBSD AIO interface

column.name: ProfileEvent_AIORead
column.Comment: Number of reads with Linux or FreeBSD AIO interface

column.name: ProfileEvent_AIOReadBytes
column.Comment: Number of bytes read with Linux or FreeBSD AIO interface

column.name: ProfileEvent_IOBufferAllocs
column.Comment: Number of allocations of IO buffers (for ReadBuffer/WriteBuffer).

column.name: ProfileEvent_IOBufferAllocBytes
column.Comment: Number of bytes allocated for IO buffers (for ReadBuffer/WriteBuffer).

column.name: ProfileEvent_ArenaAllocChunks
column.Comment: Number of chunks allocated for memory Arena (used for GROUP BY and similar operations)

column.name: ProfileEvent_ArenaAllocBytes
column.Comment: Number of bytes allocated for memory Arena (used for GROUP BY and similar operations)

column.name: ProfileEvent_FunctionExecute
column.Comment: Number of SQL ordinary function calls (SQL functions are called on per-block basis, so this number represents the number of blocks).

column.name: ProfileEvent_TableFunctionExecute
column.Comment: Number of table function calls.

column.name: ProfileEvent_DefaultImplementationForNullsRows
column.Comment: Number of rows processed by default implementation for nulls in function execution

column.name: ProfileEvent_DefaultImplementationForNullsRowsWithNulls
column.Comment: Number of rows which contain null values processed by default implementation for nulls in function execution

column.name: ProfileEvent_MarkCacheHits
column.Comment: Number of times an entry has been found in the mark cache, so we didn't have to load a mark file.

column.name: ProfileEvent_MarkCacheMisses
column.Comment: Number of times an entry has not been found in the mark cache, so we had to load a mark file in memory, which is a costly operation, adding to query latency.

column.name: ProfileEvent_PrimaryIndexCacheHits
column.Comment: Number of times an entry has been found in the primary index cache, so we didn't have to load a index file.

column.name: ProfileEvent_PrimaryIndexCacheMisses
column.Comment: Number of times an entry has not been found in the primary index cache, so we had to load a index file in memory, which is a costly operation, adding to query latency.

column.name: ProfileEvent_IcebergMetadataFilesCacheHits
column.Comment: Number of times iceberg metadata files have been found in the cache.

column.name: ProfileEvent_IcebergMetadataFilesCacheMisses
column.Comment: Number of times iceberg metadata files have not been found in the iceberg metadata cache and had to be read from (remote) disk.

column.name: ProfileEvent_IcebergMetadataFilesCacheWeightLost
column.Comment: Approximate number of bytes evicted from the iceberg metadata cache.

column.name: ProfileEvent_IcebergMetadataReadWaitTimeMicroseconds
column.Comment: Total time data readers spend waiting for iceberg metadata files to be read and parsed, summed across all reader threads.

column.name: ProfileEvent_IcebergIteratorInitializationMicroseconds
column.Comment: Total time spent on synchronous initialization of iceberg data iterators.

column.name: ProfileEvent_IcebergMetadataUpdateMicroseconds
column.Comment: Total time spent on synchronous initialization of iceberg data iterators.

column.name: ProfileEvent_IcebergMetadataReturnedObjectInfos
column.Comment: Total number of returned object infos from iceberg iterator.

column.name: ProfileEvent_IcebergMinMaxNonPrunedDeleteFiles
column.Comment: Total number of accepted data files-position delete file pairs by minmax analysis from pairs suitable by partitioning and sequence number.

column.name: ProfileEvent_IcebergMinMaxPrunedDeleteFiles
column.Comment: Total number of accepted data files-position delete file pairs by minmax analysis from pairs suitable by partitioning and sequence number.

column.name: ProfileEvent_VectorSimilarityIndexCacheHits
column.Comment: Number of times an index granule has been found in the vector index cache.

column.name: ProfileEvent_VectorSimilarityIndexCacheMisses
column.Comment: Number of times an index granule has not been found in the vector index cache and had to be read from disk.

column.name: ProfileEvent_VectorSimilarityIndexCacheWeightLost
column.Comment: Approximate number of bytes evicted from the vector index cache.

column.name: ProfileEvent_TextIndexReadDictionaryBlocks
column.Comment: Number of times a text index dictionary block has been read from disk.

column.name: ProfileEvent_TextIndexDictionaryBlockCacheHits
column.Comment: Number of times a text index dictionary block has been found in the cache.

column.name: ProfileEvent_TextIndexDictionaryBlockCacheMisses
column.Comment: Number of times a text index dictionary block has not been found in the cache.

column.name: ProfileEvent_TextIndexHeaderCacheHits
column.Comment: Number of times a header has been found in the cache.

column.name: ProfileEvent_TextIndexHeaderCacheMisses
column.Comment: Number of times a header has not been found in the cache.

column.name: ProfileEvent_TextIndexPostingsCacheHits
column.Comment: Number of times a text index posting list has been found in the cache.

column.name: ProfileEvent_TextIndexPostingsCacheMisses
column.Comment: Number of times a a text index posting list has not been found in the cache.

column.name: ProfileEvent_TextIndexReadSparseIndexBlocks
column.Comment: Number of times a sparse index block has been read from the text index.

column.name: ProfileEvent_TextIndexReaderTotalMicroseconds
column.Comment: Total time spent reading the text index.

column.name: ProfileEvent_TextIndexReadGranulesMicroseconds
column.Comment: Total time spent reading and analyzing granules of the text index.

column.name: ProfileEvent_TextIndexReadPostings
column.Comment: Number of times a posting list has been read from the text index.

column.name: ProfileEvent_TextIndexUsedEmbeddedPostings
column.Comment: Number of times a posting list embedded in the dictionary has been used.

column.name: ProfileEvent_TextIndexUseHint
column.Comment: Number of index granules where a direct reading from the text index was added as hint and was used.

column.name: ProfileEvent_TextIndexDiscardHint
column.Comment: Number of index granules where a direct reading from the text index was added as hint and was discarded due to low selectivity.

column.name: ProfileEvent_QueryConditionCacheHits
column.Comment: Number of times an entry has been found in the query condition cache (and reading of marks can be skipped). Only updated for SELECT queries with SETTING use_query_condition_cache = 1.

column.name: ProfileEvent_QueryConditionCacheMisses
column.Comment: Number of times an entry has not been found in the query condition cache (and reading of mark cannot be skipped). Only updated for SELECT queries with SETTING use_query_condition_cache = 1.

column.name: ProfileEvent_QueryCacheHits
column.Comment: Number of times a query result has been found in the query cache (and query computation was avoided). Only updated for SELECT queries with SETTING use_query_cache = 1.

column.name: ProfileEvent_QueryCacheMisses
column.Comment: Number of times a query result has not been found in the query cache (and required query computation). Only updated for SELECT queries with SETTING use_query_cache = 1.

column.name: ProfileEvent_QueryCacheAgeSeconds
column.Comment: The sum of ages of found query cache entries in seconds. The value is set both for hits and misses.

column.name: ProfileEvent_QueryCacheReadRows
column.Comment: The number of rows read from the query cache.

column.name: ProfileEvent_QueryCacheReadBytes
column.Comment: The number of (uncompressed) bytes read from the query cache.

column.name: ProfileEvent_QueryCacheWrittenRows
column.Comment: The number of rows saved into the query cache.

column.name: ProfileEvent_QueryCacheWrittenBytes
column.Comment: The number of (uncompressed) bytes saved into the query cache

column.name: ProfileEvent_CreatedReadBufferOrdinary
column.Comment: Number of times ordinary read buffer was created for reading data (while choosing among other read methods).

column.name: ProfileEvent_CreatedReadBufferDirectIO
column.Comment: Number of times a read buffer with O_DIRECT was created for reading data (while choosing among other read methods).

column.name: ProfileEvent_CreatedReadBufferDirectIOFailed
column.Comment: Number of times a read buffer with O_DIRECT was attempted to be created for reading data (while choosing among other read methods), but the OS did not allow it (due to lack of filesystem support or other reasons) and we fallen back to the ordinary reading method.

column.name: ProfileEvent_CreatedReadBufferMMap
column.Comment: Number of times a read buffer using 'mmap' was created for reading data (while choosing among other read methods).

column.name: ProfileEvent_CreatedReadBufferMMapFailed
column.Comment: Number of times a read buffer with 'mmap' was attempted to be created for reading data (while choosing among other read methods), but the OS did not allow it (due to lack of filesystem support or other reasons) and we fallen back to the ordinary reading method.

column.name: ProfileEvent_DiskReadElapsedMicroseconds
column.Comment: Total time spent waiting for read syscall. This include reads from page cache.

column.name: ProfileEvent_DiskWriteElapsedMicroseconds
column.Comment: Total time spent waiting for write syscall. This include writes to page cache.

column.name: ProfileEvent_NetworkReceiveElapsedMicroseconds
column.Comment: Total time spent waiting for data to receive or receiving data from network. Only ClickHouse-related network interaction is included, not by 3rd party libraries.

column.name: ProfileEvent_NetworkSendElapsedMicroseconds
column.Comment: Total time spent waiting for data to send to network or sending data to network. Only ClickHouse-related network interaction is included, not by 3rd party libraries.

column.name: ProfileEvent_NetworkReceiveBytes
column.Comment: Total number of bytes received from network. Only ClickHouse-related network interaction is included, not by 3rd party libraries.

column.name: ProfileEvent_NetworkSendBytes
column.Comment: Total number of bytes send to network. Only ClickHouse-related network interaction is included, not by 3rd party libraries.

column.name: ProfileEvent_FilterPartsByVirtualColumnsMicroseconds
column.Comment: Total time spent in filterPartsByVirtualColumns function.

column.name: ProfileEvent_GlobalThreadPoolExpansions
column.Comment: Counts the total number of times new threads have been added to the global thread pool. This metric indicates the frequency of expansions in the global thread pool to accommodate increased processing demands.

column.name: ProfileEvent_GlobalThreadPoolShrinks
column.Comment: Counts the total number of times the global thread pool has shrunk by removing threads. This occurs when the number of idle threads exceeds max_thread_pool_free_size, indicating adjustments in the global thread pool size in response to decreased thread utilization.

column.name: ProfileEvent_GlobalThreadPoolThreadCreationMicroseconds
column.Comment: Total time spent waiting for new threads to start.

column.name: ProfileEvent_GlobalThreadPoolLockWaitMicroseconds
column.Comment: Total time threads have spent waiting for locks in the global thread pool.

column.name: ProfileEvent_GlobalThreadPoolJobs
column.Comment: Counts the number of jobs that have been pushed to the global thread pool.

column.name: ProfileEvent_GlobalThreadPoolJobWaitTimeMicroseconds
column.Comment: Measures the elapsed time from when a job is scheduled in the thread pool to when it is picked up for execution by a worker thread. This metric helps identify delays in job processing, indicating the responsiveness of the thread pool to new tasks.

column.name: ProfileEvent_LocalThreadPoolExpansions
column.Comment: Counts the total number of times threads have been borrowed from the global thread pool to expand local thread pools.

column.name: ProfileEvent_LocalThreadPoolShrinks
column.Comment: Counts the total number of times threads have been returned to the global thread pool from local thread pools.

column.name: ProfileEvent_LocalThreadPoolThreadCreationMicroseconds
column.Comment: Total time local thread pools have spent waiting to borrow a thread from the global pool.

column.name: ProfileEvent_LocalThreadPoolLockWaitMicroseconds
column.Comment: Total time threads have spent waiting for locks in the local thread pools.

column.name: ProfileEvent_LocalThreadPoolJobs
column.Comment: Counts the number of jobs that have been pushed to the local thread pools.

column.name: ProfileEvent_LocalThreadPoolBusyMicroseconds
column.Comment: Total time threads have spent executing the actual work.

column.name: ProfileEvent_LocalThreadPoolJobWaitTimeMicroseconds
column.Comment: Measures the elapsed time from when a job is scheduled in the thread pool to when it is picked up for execution by a worker thread. This metric helps identify delays in job processing, indicating the responsiveness of the thread pool to new tasks.

column.name: ProfileEvent_DiskS3GetRequestThrottlerCount
column.Comment: Number of DiskS3 GET and SELECT requests passed through throttler: blocked and not blocked.

column.name: ProfileEvent_DiskS3GetRequestThrottlerBlocked
column.Comment: Number of DiskS3 GET and SELECT requests blocked by throttler.

column.name: ProfileEvent_DiskS3GetRequestThrottlerSleepMicroseconds
column.Comment: Total time a query was sleeping to conform DiskS3 GET and SELECT request throttling.

column.name: ProfileEvent_DiskS3PutRequestThrottlerCount
column.Comment: Number of DiskS3 PUT, COPY, POST and LIST requests passed through throttler: blocked and not blocked.

column.name: ProfileEvent_DiskS3PutRequestThrottlerBlocked
column.Comment: Number of DiskS3 PUT, COPY, POST and LIST requests blocked by throttler.

column.name: ProfileEvent_DiskS3PutRequestThrottlerSleepMicroseconds
column.Comment: Total time a query was sleeping to conform DiskS3 PUT, COPY, POST and LIST request throttling.

column.name: ProfileEvent_S3GetRequestThrottlerCount
column.Comment: Number of S3 GET and SELECT requests passed through throttler: blocked and not blocked.

column.name: ProfileEvent_S3GetRequestThrottlerBlocked
column.Comment: Number of S3 GET and SELECT requests blocked by throttler.

column.name: ProfileEvent_S3GetRequestThrottlerSleepMicroseconds
column.Comment: Total time a query was sleeping to conform S3 GET and SELECT request throttling.

column.name: ProfileEvent_S3PutRequestThrottlerCount
column.Comment: Number of S3 PUT, COPY, POST and LIST requests passed through throttler: blocked and not blocked.

column.name: ProfileEvent_S3PutRequestThrottlerBlocked
column.Comment: Number of S3 PUT, COPY, POST and LIST requests blocked by throttler.

column.name: ProfileEvent_S3PutRequestThrottlerSleepMicroseconds
column.Comment: Total time a query was sleeping to conform S3 PUT, COPY, POST and LIST request throttling.

column.name: ProfileEvent_ACMEAPIRequests
column.Comment: Number of ACME API requests issued.

column.name: ProfileEvent_ACMECertificateOrders
column.Comment: Number of ACME certificate orders issued.

column.name: ProfileEvent_DiskAzureReadMicroseconds
column.Comment: Total time spent waiting for Azure disk read requests.

column.name: ProfileEvent_DiskAzureReadRequestsCount
column.Comment: Number of Azure disk read requests.

column.name: ProfileEvent_DiskAzureReadRequestsErrors
column.Comment: Number of Azure disk read request errors.

column.name: ProfileEvent_DiskAzureReadRequestsThrottling
column.Comment: Number of Azure disk read requests throttled.

column.name: ProfileEvent_DiskAzureReadRequestsRedirects
column.Comment: Number of Azure disk read request redirects.

column.name: ProfileEvent_DiskAzureWriteMicroseconds
column.Comment: Total time spent waiting for Azure disk write requests.

column.name: ProfileEvent_DiskAzureWriteRequestsCount
column.Comment: Number of Azure disk write requests.

column.name: ProfileEvent_DiskAzureWriteRequestsErrors
column.Comment: Number of Azure disk write request errors.

column.name: ProfileEvent_DiskAzureWriteRequestsThrottling
column.Comment: Number of Azure disk write requests throttled.

column.name: ProfileEvent_DiskAzureWriteRequestsRedirects
column.Comment: Number of Azure disk write request redirects.

column.name: ProfileEvent_AzureReadMicroseconds
column.Comment: Total time spent waiting for Azure read requests.

column.name: ProfileEvent_AzureReadRequestsCount
column.Comment: Number of Azure read requests.

column.name: ProfileEvent_AzureReadRequestsErrors
column.Comment: Number of Azure read request errors.

column.name: ProfileEvent_AzureReadRequestsThrottling
column.Comment: Number of Azure read requests throttled.

column.name: ProfileEvent_AzureReadRequestsRedirects
column.Comment: Number of Azure read request redirects.

column.name: ProfileEvent_AzureWriteMicroseconds
column.Comment: Total time spent waiting for Azure read requests.

column.name: ProfileEvent_AzureWriteRequestsCount
column.Comment: Number of Azure write requests.

column.name: ProfileEvent_AzureWriteRequestsErrors
column.Comment: Number of Azure write request errors.

column.name: ProfileEvent_AzureWriteRequestsThrottling
column.Comment: Number of Azure write requests throttled.

column.name: ProfileEvent_AzureWriteRequestsRedirects
column.Comment: Number of Azure write request redirects.

column.name: ProfileEvent_AzureGetRequestThrottlerCount
column.Comment: Number of Azure GET requests passed through throttler: blocked and not blocked.

column.name: ProfileEvent_AzureGetRequestThrottlerBlocked
column.Comment: Number of Azure GET requests blocked by throttler.

column.name: ProfileEvent_AzureGetRequestThrottlerSleepMicroseconds
column.Comment: Total time a query was sleeping to conform Azure GET request throttling.

column.name: ProfileEvent_DiskAzureGetRequestThrottlerCount
column.Comment: Number of Azure disk GET requests passed through throttler: blocked and not blocked.

column.name: ProfileEvent_DiskAzureGetRequestThrottlerBlocked
column.Comment: Number of Azure disk GET requests blocked by throttler.

column.name: ProfileEvent_DiskAzureGetRequestThrottlerSleepMicroseconds
column.Comment: Total time a query was sleeping to conform Azure disk GET request throttling.

column.name: ProfileEvent_AzurePutRequestThrottlerCount
column.Comment: Number of Azure PUT requests passed through throttler: blocked and not blocked.

column.name: ProfileEvent_AzurePutRequestThrottlerBlocked
column.Comment: Number of Azure PUT requests blocked by throttler.

column.name: ProfileEvent_AzurePutRequestThrottlerSleepMicroseconds
column.Comment: Total time a query was sleeping to conform Azure PUT request throttling.

column.name: ProfileEvent_DiskAzurePutRequestThrottlerCount
column.Comment: Number of Azure disk PUT requests passed through throttler: blocked and not blocked.

column.name: ProfileEvent_DiskAzurePutRequestThrottlerBlocked
column.Comment: Number of Azure disk PUT requests blocked by throttler.

column.name: ProfileEvent_DiskAzurePutRequestThrottlerSleepMicroseconds
column.Comment: Total time a query was sleeping to conform Azure disk PUT request throttling.

column.name: ProfileEvent_RemoteReadThrottlerBytes
column.Comment: Bytes passed through 'max_remote_read_network_bandwidth_for_server'/'max_remote_read_network_bandwidth' throttler.

column.name: ProfileEvent_RemoteReadThrottlerSleepMicroseconds
column.Comment: Total time a query was sleeping to conform 'max_remote_read_network_bandwidth_for_server'/'max_remote_read_network_bandwidth' throttling.

column.name: ProfileEvent_RemoteWriteThrottlerBytes
column.Comment: Bytes passed through 'max_remote_write_network_bandwidth_for_server'/'max_remote_write_network_bandwidth' throttler.

column.name: ProfileEvent_RemoteWriteThrottlerSleepMicroseconds
column.Comment: Total time a query was sleeping to conform 'max_remote_write_network_bandwidth_for_server'/'max_remote_write_network_bandwidth' throttling.

column.name: ProfileEvent_LocalReadThrottlerBytes
column.Comment: Bytes passed through 'max_local_read_bandwidth_for_server'/'max_local_read_bandwidth' throttler.

column.name: ProfileEvent_LocalReadThrottlerSleepMicroseconds
column.Comment: Total time a query was sleeping to conform 'max_local_read_bandwidth_for_server'/'max_local_read_bandwidth' throttling.

column.name: ProfileEvent_LocalWriteThrottlerBytes
column.Comment: Bytes passed through 'max_local_write_bandwidth_for_server'/'max_local_write_bandwidth' throttler.

column.name: ProfileEvent_LocalWriteThrottlerSleepMicroseconds
column.Comment: Total time a query was sleeping to conform 'max_local_write_bandwidth_for_server'/'max_local_write_bandwidth' throttling.

column.name: ProfileEvent_BackupThrottlerBytes
column.Comment: Bytes passed through 'max_backup_bandwidth_for_server' throttler.

column.name: ProfileEvent_BackupThrottlerSleepMicroseconds
column.Comment: Total time a query was sleeping to conform 'max_backup_bandwidth_for_server' throttling.

column.name: ProfileEvent_MergesThrottlerBytes
column.Comment: Bytes passed through 'max_merges_bandwidth_for_server' throttler.

column.name: ProfileEvent_MergesThrottlerSleepMicroseconds
column.Comment: Total time a query was sleeping to conform 'max_merges_bandwidth_for_server' throttling.

column.name: ProfileEvent_MutationsThrottlerBytes
column.Comment: Bytes passed through 'max_mutations_bandwidth_for_server' throttler.

column.name: ProfileEvent_MutationsThrottlerSleepMicroseconds
column.Comment: Total time a query was sleeping to conform 'max_mutations_bandwidth_for_server' throttling.

column.name: ProfileEvent_QueryRemoteReadThrottlerBytes
column.Comment: Bytes passed through 'max_remote_read_network_bandwidth' throttler.

column.name: ProfileEvent_QueryRemoteReadThrottlerSleepMicroseconds
column.Comment: Total time a query was sleeping to conform 'max_remote_read_network_bandwidth' throttling.

column.name: ProfileEvent_QueryRemoteWriteThrottlerBytes
column.Comment: Bytes passed through 'max_remote_write_network_bandwidth' throttler.

column.name: ProfileEvent_QueryRemoteWriteThrottlerSleepMicroseconds
column.Comment: Total time a query was sleeping to conform 'max_remote_write_network_bandwidth' throttling.

column.name: ProfileEvent_QueryLocalReadThrottlerBytes
column.Comment: Bytes passed through 'max_local_read_bandwidth' throttler.

column.name: ProfileEvent_QueryLocalReadThrottlerSleepMicroseconds
column.Comment: Total time a query was sleeping to conform 'max_local_read_bandwidth' throttling.

column.name: ProfileEvent_QueryLocalWriteThrottlerBytes
column.Comment: Bytes passed through 'max_local_write_bandwidth' throttler.

column.name: ProfileEvent_QueryLocalWriteThrottlerSleepMicroseconds
column.Comment: Total time a query was sleeping to conform 'max_local_write_bandwidth' throttling.

column.name: ProfileEvent_QueryBackupThrottlerBytes
column.Comment: Bytes passed through 'max_backup_bandwidth' throttler.

column.name: ProfileEvent_QueryBackupThrottlerSleepMicroseconds
column.Comment: Total time a query was sleeping to conform 'max_backup_bandwidth' throttling.

column.name: ProfileEvent_DistrCacheReadThrottlerBytes
column.Comment: Bytes passed through 'max_distributed_cache_read_bandwidth_for_server' throttler.

column.name: ProfileEvent_DistrCacheReadThrottlerSleepMicroseconds
column.Comment: Total time a query was sleeping to conform 'max_distributed_cache_read_bandwidth_for_server' throttling.

column.name: ProfileEvent_DistrCacheWriteThrottlerBytes
column.Comment: Bytes passed through 'max_distributed_cache_write_bandwidth_for_server' throttler.

column.name: ProfileEvent_DistrCacheWriteThrottlerSleepMicroseconds
column.Comment: Total time a query was sleeping to conform 'max_distributed_cache_write_bandwidth_for_server' throttling.

column.name: ProfileEvent_ThrottlerSleepMicroseconds
column.Comment: Total time a query was sleeping to conform all throttling settings.

column.name: ProfileEvent_ReadTasksWithAppliedPatches
column.Comment: Total number of read tasks for which there was any patch part applied

column.name: ProfileEvent_PatchesAppliedInAllReadTasks
column.Comment: Total number of applied patch parts among all read tasks

column.name: ProfileEvent_PatchesMergeAppliedInAllReadTasks
column.Comment: Total number of applied patch parts with Merge mode among all read tasks

column.name: ProfileEvent_PatchesJoinAppliedInAllReadTasks
column.Comment: Total number of applied patch parts with Join mode among all read tasks

column.name: ProfileEvent_PatchesReadRows
column.Comment: Total number of rows read from patch parts

column.name: ProfileEvent_PatchesReadUncompressedBytes
column.Comment: Total number of uncompressed bytes read from patch parts

column.name: ProfileEvent_PatchesJoinRowsAddedToHashTable
column.Comment: Total number of rows added to hash tables when applying patch parts with Join mode

column.name: ProfileEvent_ApplyPatchesMicroseconds
column.Comment: Total time spent applying patch parts to blocks

column.name: ProfileEvent_ReadPatchesMicroseconds
column.Comment: Total time spent reading patch parts

column.name: ProfileEvent_BuildPatchesMergeMicroseconds
column.Comment: Total time spent building indexes for applying patch parts with Merge mode

column.name: ProfileEvent_BuildPatchesJoinMicroseconds
column.Comment: Total time spent building indexes and hash tables for applying patch parts with Join mode

column.name: ProfileEvent_AnalyzePatchRangesMicroseconds
column.Comment: Total time spent analyzing index of patch parts

column.name: ProfileEvent_ReadTasksWithAppliedMutationsOnFly
column.Comment: Total number of read tasks for which there was any mutation applied on fly

column.name: ProfileEvent_MutationsAppliedOnFlyInAllReadTasks
column.Comment: Total number of applied mutations on-fly among all read tasks

column.name: ProfileEvent_PatchesAcquireLockTries
column.Comment: Total number of tries to acquire lock for executing lightweight updates

column.name: ProfileEvent_PatchesAcquireLockMicroseconds
column.Comment: Total number of microseconds spent to acquire lock for executing lightweight updates

column.name: ProfileEvent_SchedulerIOReadRequests
column.Comment: Resource requests passed through scheduler for IO reads.

column.name: ProfileEvent_SchedulerIOReadBytes
column.Comment: Bytes passed through scheduler for IO reads.

column.name: ProfileEvent_SchedulerIOReadWaitMicroseconds
column.Comment: Total time a query was waiting on resource requests for IO reads.

column.name: ProfileEvent_SchedulerIOWriteRequests
column.Comment: Resource requests passed through scheduler for IO writes.

column.name: ProfileEvent_SchedulerIOWriteBytes
column.Comment: Bytes passed through scheduler for IO writes.

column.name: ProfileEvent_SchedulerIOWriteWaitMicroseconds
column.Comment: Total time a query was waiting on resource requests for IO writes.

column.name: ProfileEvent_QueryMaskingRulesMatch
column.Comment: Number of times query masking rules was successfully matched.

column.name: ProfileEvent_ReplicatedPartFetches
column.Comment: Number of times a data part was downloaded from replica of a ReplicatedMergeTree table.

column.name: ProfileEvent_ReplicatedPartFailedFetches
column.Comment: Number of times a data part was failed to download from replica of a ReplicatedMergeTree table.

column.name: ProfileEvent_ObsoleteReplicatedParts
column.Comment: Number of times a data part was covered by another data part that has been fetched from a replica (so, we have marked a covered data part as obsolete and no longer needed).

column.name: ProfileEvent_ReplicatedPartMerges
column.Comment: Number of times data parts of ReplicatedMergeTree tables were successfully merged.

column.name: ProfileEvent_ReplicatedPartFetchesOfMerged
column.Comment: Number of times we prefer to download already merged part from replica of ReplicatedMergeTree table instead of performing a merge ourself (usually we prefer doing a merge ourself to save network traffic). This happens when we have not all source parts to perform a merge or when the data part is old enough.

column.name: ProfileEvent_ReplicatedPartMutations
column.Comment: Number of times data parts of ReplicatedMergeTree tables were successfully mutated.

column.name: ProfileEvent_ReplicatedPartChecks
column.Comment: Number of times we had to perform advanced search for a data part on replicas or to clarify the need of an existing data part.

column.name: ProfileEvent_ReplicatedPartChecksFailed
column.Comment: Number of times the advanced search for a data part on replicas did not give result or when unexpected part has been found and moved away.

column.name: ProfileEvent_ReplicatedDataLoss
column.Comment: Number of times a data part that we wanted doesn't exist on any replica (even on replicas that are offline right now). That data parts are definitely lost. This is normal due to asynchronous replication (if quorum inserts were not enabled), when the replica on which the data part was written was failed and when it became online after fail it doesn't contain that data part.

column.name: ProfileEvent_ReplicatedCoveredPartsInZooKeeperOnStart
column.Comment: For debugging purposes. Number of parts in ZooKeeper that have a covering part, but doesn't exist on disk. Checked on server start.

column.name: ProfileEvent_QuorumParts
column.Comment: Number of data parts written with quorum. It counts as one part for sync insert and maybe up to async inserts count for insert which flushes async inserts.

column.name: ProfileEvent_QuorumWaitMicroseconds
column.Comment: Total time spent waiting for quorum during inserts.

column.name: ProfileEvent_QuorumFailedInserts
column.Comment: Number of inserts failed due to quorum not reaching.

column.name: ProfileEvent_InsertedRows
column.Comment: Number of rows INSERTed to all tables.

column.name: ProfileEvent_InsertedBytes
column.Comment: Number of bytes (uncompressed; for columns as they stored in memory) INSERTed to all tables.

column.name: ProfileEvent_DelayedInserts
column.Comment: Number of times the INSERT of a block to a MergeTree table was throttled due to high number of active data parts for partition.

column.name: ProfileEvent_RejectedInserts
column.Comment: Number of times the INSERT of a block to a MergeTree table was rejected with 'Too many parts' exception due to high number of active data parts for partition.

column.name: ProfileEvent_DelayedInsertsMilliseconds
column.Comment: Total number of milliseconds spent while the INSERT of a block to a MergeTree table was throttled due to high number of active data parts for partition.

column.name: ProfileEvent_DelayedMutations
column.Comment: Number of times the mutation of a MergeTree table was throttled due to high number of unfinished mutations for table.

column.name: ProfileEvent_RejectedMutations
column.Comment: Number of times the mutation of a MergeTree table was rejected with 'Too many mutations' exception due to high number of unfinished mutations for table.

column.name: ProfileEvent_DelayedMutationsMilliseconds
column.Comment: Total number of milliseconds spent while the mutation of a MergeTree table was throttled due to high number of unfinished mutations for table.

column.name: ProfileEvent_RejectedLightweightUpdates
column.Comment: Number of time the lightweight update was rejected due to too many uncompressed bytes in patches.

column.name: ProfileEvent_DistributedDelayedInserts
column.Comment: Number of times the INSERT of a block to a Distributed table was throttled due to high number of pending bytes.

column.name: ProfileEvent_DistributedRejectedInserts
column.Comment: Number of times the INSERT of a block to a Distributed table was rejected with 'Too many bytes' exception due to high number of pending bytes.

column.name: ProfileEvent_DistributedDelayedInsertsMilliseconds
column.Comment: Total number of milliseconds spent while the INSERT of a block to a Distributed table was throttled due to high number of pending bytes.

column.name: ProfileEvent_DuplicatedInsertedBlocks
column.Comment: Number of the synchronous inserts to a *MergeTree table was deduplicated.

column.name: ProfileEvent_SelfDuplicatedAsyncInserts
column.Comment: Number of async inserts in the INSERTed block to a ReplicatedMergeTree table was self deduplicated.

column.name: ProfileEvent_DuplicatedAsyncInserts
column.Comment: Number of async inserts in the INSERTed block to a ReplicatedMergeTree table was deduplicated.

column.name: ProfileEvent_DuplicationElapsedMicroseconds
column.Comment: Total time spent checking for duplication of INSERTed blocks to *MergeTree tables.

column.name: ProfileEvent_ZooKeeperInit
column.Comment: Number of times connection with ZooKeeper has been established.

column.name: ProfileEvent_ZooKeeperTransactions
column.Comment: Number of ZooKeeper operations, which include both read and write operations as well as multi-transactions.

column.name: ProfileEvent_ZooKeeperList
column.Comment: Number of 'list' (getChildren) requests to ZooKeeper.

column.name: ProfileEvent_ZooKeeperCreate
column.Comment: Number of 'create' requests to ZooKeeper.

column.name: ProfileEvent_ZooKeeperRemove
column.Comment: Number of 'remove' requests to ZooKeeper.

column.name: ProfileEvent_ZooKeeperExists
column.Comment: Number of 'exists' requests to ZooKeeper.

column.name: ProfileEvent_ZooKeeperGet
column.Comment: Number of 'get' requests to ZooKeeper.

column.name: ProfileEvent_ZooKeeperSet
column.Comment: Number of 'set' requests to ZooKeeper.

column.name: ProfileEvent_ZooKeeperMulti
column.Comment: Number of 'multi' requests to ZooKeeper (compound transactions).

column.name: ProfileEvent_ZooKeeperMultiRead
column.Comment: Number of read 'multi' requests to ZooKeeper (compound transactions).

column.name: ProfileEvent_ZooKeeperMultiWrite
column.Comment: Number of write 'multi' requests to ZooKeeper (compound transactions).

column.name: ProfileEvent_ZooKeeperCheck
column.Comment: Number of 'check' requests to ZooKeeper. Usually they don't make sense in isolation, only as part of a complex transaction.

column.name: ProfileEvent_ZooKeeperSync
column.Comment: Number of 'sync' requests to ZooKeeper. These requests are rarely needed or usable.

column.name: ProfileEvent_ZooKeeperReconfig
column.Comment: Number of 'reconfig' requests to ZooKeeper.

column.name: ProfileEvent_ZooKeeperClose
column.Comment: Number of times connection with ZooKeeper has been closed voluntary.

column.name: ProfileEvent_ZooKeeperGetACL
column.Comment: Number of 'getACL' requests to ZooKeeper.

column.name: ProfileEvent_ZooKeeperWatchResponse
column.Comment: Number of times watch notification has been received from ZooKeeper.

column.name: ProfileEvent_ZooKeeperUserExceptions
column.Comment: Number of exceptions while working with ZooKeeper related to the data (no node, bad version or similar).

column.name: ProfileEvent_ZooKeeperHardwareExceptions
column.Comment: Number of exceptions while working with ZooKeeper related to network (connection loss or similar).

column.name: ProfileEvent_ZooKeeperOtherExceptions
column.Comment: Number of exceptions while working with ZooKeeper other than ZooKeeperUserExceptions and ZooKeeperHardwareExceptions.

column.name: ProfileEvent_ZooKeeperWaitMicroseconds
column.Comment: Number of microseconds spent waiting for responses from ZooKeeper after creating a request, summed across all the requesting threads.

column.name: ProfileEvent_ZooKeeperBytesSent
column.Comment: Number of bytes send over network while communicating with ZooKeeper.

column.name: ProfileEvent_ZooKeeperBytesReceived
column.Comment: Number of bytes received over network while communicating with ZooKeeper.

column.name: ProfileEvent_DistributedConnectionTries
column.Comment: Total count of distributed connection attempts.

column.name: ProfileEvent_DistributedConnectionUsable
column.Comment: Total count of successful distributed connections to a usable server (with required table, but maybe stale).

column.name: ProfileEvent_DistributedConnectionFailTry
column.Comment: Total count when distributed connection fails with retry.

column.name: ProfileEvent_DistributedConnectionMissingTable
column.Comment: Number of times we rejected a replica from a distributed query, because it did not contain a table needed for the query.

column.name: ProfileEvent_DistributedConnectionStaleReplica
column.Comment: Number of times we rejected a replica from a distributed query, because some table needed for a query had replication lag higher than the configured threshold.

column.name: ProfileEvent_DistributedConnectionSkipReadOnlyReplica
column.Comment: Number of replicas skipped during INSERT into Distributed table due to replicas being read-only

column.name: ProfileEvent_DistributedConnectionFailAtAll
column.Comment: Total count when distributed connection fails after all retries finished.

column.name: ProfileEvent_HedgedRequestsChangeReplica
column.Comment: Total count when timeout for changing replica expired in hedged requests.

column.name: ProfileEvent_SuspendSendingQueryToShard
column.Comment: Total count when sending query to shard was suspended when async_query_sending_for_remote is enabled.

column.name: ProfileEvent_CompileFunction
column.Comment: Number of times a compilation of generated LLVM code (to create fused function for complex expressions) was initiated.

column.name: ProfileEvent_CompiledFunctionExecute
column.Comment: Number of times a compiled function was executed.

column.name: ProfileEvent_CompileExpressionsMicroseconds
column.Comment: Total time spent for compilation of expressions to LLVM code.

column.name: ProfileEvent_CompileExpressionsBytes
column.Comment: Number of bytes used for expressions compilation.

column.name: ProfileEvent_ExecuteShellCommand
column.Comment: Number of shell command executions.

column.name: ProfileEvent_ExternalProcessingCompressedBytesTotal
column.Comment: Number of compressed bytes written by external processing (sorting/aggragating/joining)

column.name: ProfileEvent_ExternalProcessingUncompressedBytesTotal
column.Comment: Amount of data (uncompressed, before compression) written by external processing (sorting/aggragating/joining)

column.name: ProfileEvent_ExternalProcessingFilesTotal
column.Comment: Number of files used by external processing (sorting/aggragating/joining)

column.name: ProfileEvent_ExternalSortWritePart
column.Comment: Number of times a temporary file was written to disk for sorting in external memory.

column.name: ProfileEvent_ExternalSortMerge
column.Comment: Number of times temporary files were merged for sorting in external memory.

column.name: ProfileEvent_ExternalSortCompressedBytes
column.Comment: Number of compressed bytes written for sorting in external memory.

column.name: ProfileEvent_ExternalSortUncompressedBytes
column.Comment: Amount of data (uncompressed, before compression) written for sorting in external memory.

column.name: ProfileEvent_ExternalAggregationWritePart
column.Comment: Number of times a temporary file was written to disk for aggregation in external memory.

column.name: ProfileEvent_ExternalAggregationMerge
column.Comment: Number of times temporary files were merged for aggregation in external memory.

column.name: ProfileEvent_ExternalAggregationCompressedBytes
column.Comment: Number of bytes written to disk for aggregation in external memory.

column.name: ProfileEvent_ExternalAggregationUncompressedBytes
column.Comment: Amount of data (uncompressed, before compression) written to disk for aggregation in external memory.

column.name: ProfileEvent_ExternalJoinWritePart
column.Comment: Number of times a temporary file was written to disk for JOIN in external memory.

column.name: ProfileEvent_ExternalJoinMerge
column.Comment: Number of times temporary files were merged for JOIN in external memory.

column.name: ProfileEvent_ExternalJoinCompressedBytes
column.Comment: Number of compressed bytes written for JOIN in external memory.

column.name: ProfileEvent_ExternalJoinUncompressedBytes
column.Comment: Amount of data (uncompressed, before compression) written for JOIN in external memory.

column.name: ProfileEvent_IcebergPartitionPrunedFiles
column.Comment: Number of skipped files during Iceberg partition pruning

column.name: ProfileEvent_IcebergTrivialCountOptimizationApplied
column.Comment: Trivial count optimization applied while reading from Iceberg

column.name: ProfileEvent_IcebergVersionHintUsed
column.Comment: Number of times version-hint.text has been used.

column.name: ProfileEvent_IcebergMinMaxIndexPrunedFiles
column.Comment: Number of skipped files by using MinMax index in Iceberg

column.name: ProfileEvent_JoinBuildTableRowCount
column.Comment: Total number of rows in the build table for a JOIN operation.

column.name: ProfileEvent_JoinProbeTableRowCount
column.Comment: Total number of rows in the probe table for a JOIN operation.

column.name: ProfileEvent_JoinResultRowCount
column.Comment: Total number of rows in the result of a JOIN operation.

column.name: ProfileEvent_JoinReorderMicroseconds
column.Comment: Total time spent executing JOIN reordering algorithm.

column.name: ProfileEvent_JoinOptimizeMicroseconds
column.Comment: Total time spent executing JOIN plan optimizations.

column.name: ProfileEvent_QueryPlanOptimizeMicroseconds
column.Comment: Total time spent executing query plan optimizations.

column.name: ProfileEvent_DeltaLakePartitionPrunedFiles
column.Comment: Number of skipped files during DeltaLake partition pruning

column.name: ProfileEvent_DeltaLakeSnapshotInitializations
column.Comment: Number of times a DeltaLake table snapshot was initialized (loaded from object storage)

column.name: ProfileEvent_DeltaLakeScannedFiles
column.Comment: Number of files scanned during DeltaLake scan callbacks

column.name: ProfileEvent_SlowRead
column.Comment: Number of reads from a file that were slow. This indicate system overload. Thresholds are controlled by read_backoff_* settings.

column.name: ProfileEvent_ReadBackoff
column.Comment: Number of times the number of query processing threads was lowered due to slow reads.

column.name: ProfileEvent_ReplicaPartialShutdown
column.Comment: How many times Replicated table has to deinitialize its state due to session expiration in ZooKeeper. The state is reinitialized every time when ZooKeeper is available again.

column.name: ProfileEvent_IndexAnalysisRounds
column.Comment: Number of times index analysis was performed within the query.

column.name: ProfileEvent_SelectedParts
column.Comment: Number of data parts selected to read from a MergeTree table.

column.name: ProfileEvent_SelectedPartsTotal
column.Comment: Number of total data parts before selecting which ones to read from a MergeTree table.

column.name: ProfileEvent_SelectedRanges
column.Comment: Number of (non-adjacent) ranges in all data parts selected to read from a MergeTree table.

column.name: ProfileEvent_SelectedMarks
column.Comment: Number of marks (index granules) selected to read from a MergeTree table.

column.name: ProfileEvent_SelectedMarksTotal
column.Comment: Number of total marks (index granules) before selecting which ones to read from a MergeTree table.

column.name: ProfileEvent_SelectedRows
column.Comment: Number of rows SELECTed from all tables.

column.name: ProfileEvent_SelectedBytes
column.Comment: Number of bytes (uncompressed; for columns as they stored in memory) SELECTed from all tables.

column.name: ProfileEvent_RowsReadByMainReader
column.Comment: Number of rows read from MergeTree tables by the main reader (after PREWHERE step).

column.name: ProfileEvent_RowsReadByPrewhereReaders
column.Comment: Number of rows read from MergeTree tables (in total) by prewhere readers.

column.name: ProfileEvent_LoadedDataParts
column.Comment: Number of data parts loaded by MergeTree tables during initialization.

column.name: ProfileEvent_LoadedDataPartsMicroseconds
column.Comment: Microseconds spent by MergeTree tables for loading data parts during initialization.

column.name: ProfileEvent_FilteringMarksWithPrimaryKeyMicroseconds
column.Comment: Time spent filtering parts by PK.

column.name: ProfileEvent_FilteringMarksWithSecondaryKeysMicroseconds
column.Comment: Time spent filtering parts by skip indexes.

column.name: ProfileEvent_DistributedIndexAnalysisMicroseconds
column.Comment: Total time spent during distributed index analysis

column.name: ProfileEvent_DistributedIndexAnalysisScheduledReplicas
column.Comment: Number of replicas (local replica will be accounted once) to which distributed index analysis has been scheduled

column.name: ProfileEvent_DistributedIndexAnalysisReplicaUnavailable
column.Comment: Number of times distributed index analysis failed on one of replicas without fallback (failed during connect)

column.name: ProfileEvent_DistributedIndexAnalysisReplicaFallback
column.Comment: Number of times distributed index analysis failed on one of replicas with fallback to local replica

column.name: ProfileEvent_DistributedIndexAnalysisParts
column.Comment: Number of parts send for distributed index analysis

column.name: ProfileEvent_DistributedIndexAnalysisMissingParts
column.Comment: Number of missing parts during distributed index analysis that will be resolved locally

column.name: ProfileEvent_WaitMarksLoadMicroseconds
column.Comment: Time spent loading marks

column.name: ProfileEvent_BackgroundLoadingMarksTasks
column.Comment: Number of background tasks for loading marks

column.name: ProfileEvent_MarksTasksFromCache
column.Comment: Number of times marks were loaded synchronously because they were already present in the cache.

column.name: ProfileEvent_LoadingMarksTasksCanceled
column.Comment: Number of times background tasks for loading marks were canceled

column.name: ProfileEvent_LoadedMarksFiles
column.Comment: Number of mark files loaded.

column.name: ProfileEvent_LoadedMarksCount
column.Comment: Number of marks loaded (total across columns).

column.name: ProfileEvent_LoadedMarksMemoryBytes
column.Comment: Size of in-memory representations of loaded marks.

column.name: ProfileEvent_MarkCacheEvictedBytes
column.Comment: Number of bytes evicted from the mark cache.

column.name: ProfileEvent_MarkCacheEvictedMarks
column.Comment: Number of marks evicted from the mark cache.

column.name: ProfileEvent_MarkCacheEvictedFiles
column.Comment: Number of mark files evicted from the mark cache.

column.name: ProfileEvent_LoadedPrimaryIndexFiles
column.Comment: Number of primary index files loaded.

column.name: ProfileEvent_LoadedPrimaryIndexRows
column.Comment: Number of rows of primary key loaded.

column.name: ProfileEvent_LoadedPrimaryIndexBytes
column.Comment: Number of rows of primary key loaded.

column.name: ProfileEvent_Merge
column.Comment: Number of launched background merges.

column.name: ProfileEvent_MergeSourceParts
column.Comment: Number of source parts scheduled for merges.

column.name: ProfileEvent_MergedRows
column.Comment: Rows read for background merges. This is the number of rows before merge.

column.name: ProfileEvent_MergedColumns
column.Comment: Number of columns merged during the horizontal stage of merges.

column.name: ProfileEvent_GatheredColumns
column.Comment: Number of columns gathered during the vertical stage of merges.

column.name: ProfileEvent_MergedUncompressedBytes
column.Comment: Uncompressed bytes (for columns as they stored in memory) that was read for background merges. This is the number before merge.

column.name: ProfileEvent_MergeWrittenRows
column.Comment: Number of rows written during the merge.

column.name: ProfileEvent_MergeTotalMilliseconds
column.Comment: Total time spent for background merges

column.name: ProfileEvent_MergeExecuteMilliseconds
column.Comment: Total busy time spent for execution of background merges

column.name: ProfileEvent_MergeHorizontalStageTotalMilliseconds
column.Comment: Total time spent for horizontal stage of background merges

column.name: ProfileEvent_MergeHorizontalStageExecuteMilliseconds
column.Comment: Total busy time spent for execution of horizontal stage of background merges

column.name: ProfileEvent_MergeVerticalStageTotalMilliseconds
column.Comment: Total time spent for vertical stage of background merges

column.name: ProfileEvent_MergeVerticalStageExecuteMilliseconds
column.Comment: Total busy time spent for execution of vertical stage of background merges

column.name: ProfileEvent_MergeTextIndexStageTotalMilliseconds
column.Comment: Total time spent for text index stage of background merges

column.name: ProfileEvent_MergeTextIndexStageExecuteMilliseconds
column.Comment: Total busy time spent for execution of text index stage of background merges

column.name: ProfileEvent_MergeProjectionStageTotalMilliseconds
column.Comment: Total time spent for projection stage of background merges

column.name: ProfileEvent_MergeProjectionStageExecuteMilliseconds
column.Comment: Total busy time spent for execution of projection stage of background merges

column.name: ProfileEvent_MergePrewarmStageTotalMilliseconds
column.Comment: Total time spent for prewarm stage of background merges

column.name: ProfileEvent_MergePrewarmStageExecuteMilliseconds
column.Comment: Total busy time spent for execution of prewarm stage of background merges

column.name: ProfileEvent_MergesRejectedByMemoryLimit
column.Comment: Number of background merges rejected due to memory limit

column.name: ProfileEvent_MergingSortedMilliseconds
column.Comment: Total time spent while merging sorted columns

column.name: ProfileEvent_AggregatingSortedMilliseconds
column.Comment: Total time spent while aggregating sorted columns

column.name: ProfileEvent_CoalescingSortedMilliseconds
column.Comment: Total time spent while coalescing sorted columns

column.name: ProfileEvent_CollapsingSortedMilliseconds
column.Comment: Total time spent while collapsing sorted columns

column.name: ProfileEvent_ReplacingSortedMilliseconds
column.Comment: Total time spent while replacing sorted columns

column.name: ProfileEvent_SummingSortedMilliseconds
column.Comment: Total time spent while summing sorted columns

column.name: ProfileEvent_VersionedCollapsingSortedMilliseconds
column.Comment: Total time spent while version collapsing sorted columns

column.name: ProfileEvent_GatheringColumnMilliseconds
column.Comment: Total time spent while gathering columns for vertical merge

column.name: ProfileEvent_MutationTotalParts
column.Comment: Number of total parts for which mutations tried to be applied

column.name: ProfileEvent_MutationUntouchedParts
column.Comment: Number of total parts for which mutations tried to be applied but which was completely skipped according to predicate

column.name: ProfileEvent_MutationCreatedEmptyParts
column.Comment: Number of total parts which were replaced to empty parts instead of running mutation

column.name: ProfileEvent_MutatedRows
column.Comment: Rows read for mutations. This is the number of rows before mutation

column.name: ProfileEvent_MutatedUncompressedBytes
column.Comment: Uncompressed bytes (for columns as they stored in memory) that was read for mutations. This is the number before mutation.

column.name: ProfileEvent_MutationAffectedRowsUpperBound
column.Comment: The upper bound of number of rows that were affected by mutation (e.g. number of rows that satisfy the predicate of UPDATE or DELETE mutation). The actual number may be slightly less

column.name: ProfileEvent_MutationTotalMilliseconds
column.Comment: Total time spent for mutations.

column.name: ProfileEvent_MutationExecuteMilliseconds
column.Comment: Total busy time spent for execution of mutations.

column.name: ProfileEvent_MutationAllPartColumns
column.Comment: Number of times when task to mutate all columns in part was created

column.name: ProfileEvent_MutationSomePartColumns
column.Comment: Number of times when task to mutate some columns in part was created

column.name: ProfileEvent_MutateTaskProjectionsCalculationMicroseconds
column.Comment: Time spent calculating projections in mutations

column.name: ProfileEvent_MergeTreeDataWriterRows
column.Comment: Number of rows INSERTed to MergeTree tables.

column.name: ProfileEvent_MergeTreeDataWriterUncompressedBytes
column.Comment: Uncompressed bytes (for columns as they stored in memory) INSERTed to MergeTree tables.

column.name: ProfileEvent_MergeTreeDataWriterCompressedBytes
column.Comment: Bytes written to filesystem for data INSERTed to MergeTree tables.

column.name: ProfileEvent_MergeTreeDataWriterBlocks
column.Comment: Number of blocks INSERTed to MergeTree tables. Each block forms a data part of level zero.

column.name: ProfileEvent_MergeTreeDataWriterBlocksAlreadySorted
column.Comment: Number of blocks INSERTed to MergeTree tables that appeared to be already sorted.

column.name: ProfileEvent_MergeMutateBackgroundExecutorTaskExecuteStepMicroseconds
column.Comment: Time spent in executeStep() for MergeMutate executor tasks.

column.name: ProfileEvent_MergeMutateBackgroundExecutorTaskCancelMicroseconds
column.Comment: Time spent in cancel() for MergeMutate executor tasks.

column.name: ProfileEvent_MergeMutateBackgroundExecutorTaskResetMicroseconds
column.Comment: Time spent resetting task for MergeMutate executor.

column.name: ProfileEvent_MergeMutateBackgroundExecutorWaitMicroseconds
column.Comment: Time spent waiting for completion in MergeMutate executor.

column.name: ProfileEvent_MoveBackgroundExecutorTaskExecuteStepMicroseconds
column.Comment: Time spent in executeStep() for Move executor tasks.

column.name: ProfileEvent_MoveBackgroundExecutorTaskCancelMicroseconds
column.Comment: Time spent in cancel() for Move executor tasks.

column.name: ProfileEvent_MoveBackgroundExecutorTaskResetMicroseconds
column.Comment: Time spent resetting task for Move executor.

column.name: ProfileEvent_MoveBackgroundExecutorWaitMicroseconds
column.Comment: Time spent waiting for completion in Move executor.

column.name: ProfileEvent_FetchBackgroundExecutorTaskExecuteStepMicroseconds
column.Comment: Time spent in executeStep() for Fetch executor tasks.

column.name: ProfileEvent_FetchBackgroundExecutorTaskCancelMicroseconds
column.Comment: Time spent in cancel() for Fetch executor tasks.

column.name: ProfileEvent_FetchBackgroundExecutorTaskResetMicroseconds
column.Comment: Time spent resetting task for Fetch executor.

column.name: ProfileEvent_FetchBackgroundExecutorWaitMicroseconds
column.Comment: Time spent waiting for completion in Fetch executor.

column.name: ProfileEvent_CommonBackgroundExecutorTaskExecuteStepMicroseconds
column.Comment: Time spent in executeStep() for Common executor tasks.

column.name: ProfileEvent_CommonBackgroundExecutorTaskCancelMicroseconds
column.Comment: Time spent in cancel() for Common executor tasks.

column.name: ProfileEvent_CommonBackgroundExecutorTaskResetMicroseconds
column.Comment: Time spent resetting task for Common executor.

column.name: ProfileEvent_CommonBackgroundExecutorWaitMicroseconds
column.Comment: Time spent waiting for completion in Common executor.

column.name: ProfileEvent_MergeTreeDataWriterSkipIndicesCalculationMicroseconds
column.Comment: Time spent calculating skip indices

column.name: ProfileEvent_MergeTreeDataWriterStatisticsCalculationMicroseconds
column.Comment: Time spent calculating statistics

column.name: ProfileEvent_MergeTreeDataWriterSortingBlocksMicroseconds
column.Comment: Time spent sorting blocks

column.name: ProfileEvent_MergeTreeDataWriterMergingBlocksMicroseconds
column.Comment: Time spent merging input blocks (for special MergeTree engines)

column.name: ProfileEvent_MergeTreeDataWriterProjectionsCalculationMicroseconds
column.Comment: Time spent calculating projections

column.name: ProfileEvent_MergeTreeDataProjectionWriterSortingBlocksMicroseconds
column.Comment: Time spent sorting blocks (for projection it might be a key different from table's sorting key)

column.name: ProfileEvent_MergeTreeDataProjectionWriterMergingBlocksMicroseconds
column.Comment: Time spent merging blocks

column.name: ProfileEvent_InsertedWideParts
column.Comment: Number of parts inserted in Wide format.

column.name: ProfileEvent_InsertedCompactParts
column.Comment: Number of parts inserted in Compact format.

column.name: ProfileEvent_MergedIntoWideParts
column.Comment: Number of parts merged into Wide format.

column.name: ProfileEvent_MergedIntoCompactParts
column.Comment: Number of parts merged into Compact format.

column.name: ProfileEvent_MergeTreeDataProjectionWriterRows
column.Comment: Number of rows INSERTed to MergeTree tables projection.

column.name: ProfileEvent_MergeTreeDataProjectionWriterUncompressedBytes
column.Comment: Uncompressed bytes (for columns as they stored in memory) INSERTed to MergeTree tables projection.

column.name: ProfileEvent_MergeTreeDataProjectionWriterCompressedBytes
column.Comment: Bytes written to filesystem for data INSERTed to MergeTree tables projection.

column.name: ProfileEvent_MergeTreeDataProjectionWriterBlocks
column.Comment: Number of blocks INSERTed to MergeTree tables projection. Each block forms a data part of level zero.

column.name: ProfileEvent_MergeTreeDataProjectionWriterBlocksAlreadySorted
column.Comment: Number of blocks INSERTed to MergeTree tables projection that appeared to be already sorted.

column.name: ProfileEvent_CannotRemoveEphemeralNode
column.Comment: Number of times an error happened while trying to remove ephemeral node. This is not an issue, because our implementation of ZooKeeper library guarantee that the session will expire and the node will be removed.

column.name: ProfileEvent_RegexpWithMultipleNeedlesCreated
column.Comment: Regular expressions with multiple needles (VectorScan library) compiled.

column.name: ProfileEvent_RegexpWithMultipleNeedlesGlobalCacheHit
column.Comment: Number of times we fetched compiled regular expression with multiple needles (VectorScan library) from the global cache.

column.name: ProfileEvent_RegexpWithMultipleNeedlesGlobalCacheMiss
column.Comment: Number of times we failed to fetch compiled regular expression with multiple needles (VectorScan library) from the global cache.

column.name: ProfileEvent_RegexpLocalCacheHit
column.Comment: Number of times we fetched compiled regular expression from a local cache.

column.name: ProfileEvent_RegexpLocalCacheMiss
column.Comment: Number of times we failed to fetch compiled regular expression from a local cache.

column.name: ProfileEvent_ContextLock
column.Comment: Number of times the lock of Context was acquired or tried to acquire. This is global lock.

column.name: ProfileEvent_ContextLockWaitMicroseconds
column.Comment: Context lock wait time in microseconds

column.name: ProfileEvent_StorageBufferFlush
column.Comment: Number of times a buffer in a 'Buffer' table was flushed.

column.name: ProfileEvent_StorageBufferErrorOnFlush
column.Comment: Number of times a buffer in the 'Buffer' table has not been able to flush due to error writing in the destination table.

column.name: ProfileEvent_StorageBufferPassedAllMinThresholds
column.Comment: Number of times a criteria on min thresholds has been reached to flush a buffer in a 'Buffer' table.

column.name: ProfileEvent_StorageBufferPassedTimeMaxThreshold
column.Comment: Number of times a criteria on max time threshold has been reached to flush a buffer in a 'Buffer' table.

column.name: ProfileEvent_StorageBufferPassedRowsMaxThreshold
column.Comment: Number of times a criteria on max rows threshold has been reached to flush a buffer in a 'Buffer' table.

column.name: ProfileEvent_StorageBufferPassedBytesMaxThreshold
column.Comment: Number of times a criteria on max bytes threshold has been reached to flush a buffer in a 'Buffer' table.

column.name: ProfileEvent_StorageBufferPassedTimeFlushThreshold
column.Comment: Number of times background-only flush threshold on time has been reached to flush a buffer in a 'Buffer' table. This is expert-only metric. If you read this and you are not an expert, stop reading.

column.name: ProfileEvent_StorageBufferPassedRowsFlushThreshold
column.Comment: Number of times background-only flush threshold on rows has been reached to flush a buffer in a 'Buffer' table. This is expert-only metric. If you read this and you are not an expert, stop reading.

column.name: ProfileEvent_StorageBufferPassedBytesFlushThreshold
column.Comment: Number of times background-only flush threshold on bytes has been reached to flush a buffer in a 'Buffer' table. This is expert-only metric. If you read this and you are not an expert, stop reading.

column.name: ProfileEvent_StorageBufferLayerLockReadersWaitMilliseconds
column.Comment: Time for waiting for Buffer layer during reading.

column.name: ProfileEvent_StorageBufferLayerLockWritersWaitMilliseconds
column.Comment: Time for waiting free Buffer layer to write to (can be used to tune Buffer layers).

column.name: ProfileEvent_SystemLogErrorOnFlush
column.Comment: Number of times any of the system logs have failed to flush to the corresponding system table. Attempts to flush are repeated.

column.name: ProfileEvent_DictCacheKeysRequested
column.Comment: Number of keys requested from the data source for the dictionaries of 'cache' types.

column.name: ProfileEvent_DictCacheKeysRequestedMiss
column.Comment: Number of keys requested from the data source for dictionaries of 'cache' types but not found in the data source.

column.name: ProfileEvent_DictCacheKeysRequestedFound
column.Comment: Number of keys requested from the data source for dictionaries of 'cache' types and found in the data source.

column.name: ProfileEvent_DictCacheKeysExpired
column.Comment: Number of keys looked up in the dictionaries of 'cache' types and found in the cache but they were obsolete.

column.name: ProfileEvent_DictCacheKeysNotFound
column.Comment: Number of keys looked up in the dictionaries of 'cache' types and not found.

column.name: ProfileEvent_DictCacheKeysHit
column.Comment: Number of keys looked up in the dictionaries of 'cache' types and found in the cache.

column.name: ProfileEvent_DictCacheRequestTimeNs
column.Comment: Number of nanoseconds spend in querying the external data sources for the dictionaries of 'cache' types.

column.name: ProfileEvent_DictCacheRequests
column.Comment: Number of bulk requests to the external data sources for the dictionaries of 'cache' types.

column.name: ProfileEvent_DictCacheLockWriteNs
column.Comment: Number of nanoseconds spend in waiting for write lock to update the data for the dictionaries of 'cache' types.

column.name: ProfileEvent_DictCacheLockReadNs
column.Comment: Number of nanoseconds spend in waiting for read lock to lookup the data for the dictionaries of 'cache' types.

column.name: ProfileEvent_DistributedSyncInsertionTimeoutExceeded
column.Comment: A timeout has exceeded while waiting for shards during synchronous insertion into a Distributed table (with 'distributed_foreground_insert' = 1)

column.name: ProfileEvent_DistributedAsyncInsertionFailures
column.Comment: Number of failures for asynchronous insertion into a Distributed table (with 'distributed_foreground_insert' = 0)

column.name: ProfileEvent_DataAfterMergeDiffersFromReplica
column.Comment: Number of times data after merge is not byte-identical to the data on another replicas. There could be several reasons: 1. Using newer version of compression library after server update. 2. Using another compression method. 3. Non-deterministic compression algorithm (highly unlikely). 4. Non-deterministic merge algorithm due to logical error in code. 5. Data corruption in memory due to bug in code. 6. Data corruption in memory due to hardware issue. 7. Manual modification of source data after server startup. 8. Manual modification of checksums stored in ZooKeeper. 9. Part format related settings like 'enable_mixed_granularity_parts' are different on different replicas. The server successfully detected this situation and will download merged part from the replica to force the byte-identical result.

column.name: ProfileEvent_DataAfterMutationDiffersFromReplica
column.Comment: Number of times data after mutation is not byte-identical to the data on other replicas. In addition to the reasons described in 'DataAfterMergeDiffersFromReplica', it is also possible due to non-deterministic mutation.

column.name: ProfileEvent_PolygonsAddedToPool
column.Comment: A polygon has been added to the cache (pool) for the 'pointInPolygon' function.

column.name: ProfileEvent_PolygonsInPoolAllocatedBytes
column.Comment: The number of bytes for polygons added to the cache (pool) for the 'pointInPolygon' function.

column.name: ProfileEvent_NaiveBayesClassifierModelsLoaded
column.Comment: Number of Naive Bayes Classifier models loaded.

column.name: ProfileEvent_NaiveBayesClassifierModelsAllocatedBytes
column.Comment: Number of bytes allocated for Naive Bayes Classifier models.

column.name: ProfileEvent_USearchAddCount
column.Comment: Number of vectors added to usearch indexes.

column.name: ProfileEvent_USearchAddVisitedMembers
column.Comment: Number of nodes visited when adding vectors to usearch indexes.

column.name: ProfileEvent_USearchAddComputedDistances
column.Comment: Number of times distance was computed when adding vectors to usearch indexes.

column.name: ProfileEvent_USearchSearchCount
column.Comment: Number of search operations performed in usearch indexes.

column.name: ProfileEvent_USearchSearchVisitedMembers
column.Comment: Number of nodes visited when searching in usearch indexes.

column.name: ProfileEvent_USearchSearchComputedDistances
column.Comment: Number of times distance was computed when searching usearch indexes.

column.name: ProfileEvent_RWLockAcquiredReadLocks
column.Comment: Number of times a read lock was acquired (in a heavy RWLock).

column.name: ProfileEvent_RWLockAcquiredWriteLocks
column.Comment: Number of times a write lock was acquired (in a heavy RWLock).

column.name: ProfileEvent_RWLockReadersWaitMilliseconds
column.Comment: Total time spent waiting for a read lock to be acquired (in a heavy RWLock).

column.name: ProfileEvent_RWLockWritersWaitMilliseconds
column.Comment: Total time spent waiting for a write lock to be acquired (in a heavy RWLock).

column.name: ProfileEvent_DNSError
column.Comment: Total count of errors in DNS resolution
